untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of symmetrical triangle apex formation and short-term downtrend context, which cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators and operators. A true implementation would require pattern recognition (triangle detection) and trend analysis beyond simple price/moving average comparisons.
translation_notes: Translated core candlestick mechanics: white candle (close > open), opens at low (open == low), tall body relative to volatility (body > atr_14). Exit condition is a reversal (close < open). However, the symmetrical triangle apex detection and downtrend confirmation cannot be reliably expressed with available indicators. Recommend adding triangle_detected or trend_strength indicators for production use.
